hero.title: 4 Days, Varanasi by Air.
hero.titleAccent: The Sacred City, the Easy Way from Delhi.
hero.intro: The Varanasi essentials with the convenience of domestic flights. Fly in from Delhi, experience the sunrise boats, the Ganga Aarti and Sarnath, and fly back, no long overland journeys, all the spiritual intensity.

overview.heading: 4 Days Varanasi with Domestic Flights: The Full Picture
body: This 4 day package delivers the full Varanasi experience with the ease of domestic flights. You fly into Varanasi, usually from Delhi, so there is no long train or road journey, leaving more time for the city itself: the ghats, the sunrise boats and the unforgettable Ganga Aarti.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, the trip includes the domestic flights and a private vehicle with driver guide in Varanasi. It is ideal for travellers who want the spiritual heart of the city without the lengthy overland travel, and who value comfort and time efficiency.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: Sunrise Boat Ride
items.body: Drift along the ghats at first light as pilgrims bathe and the rising sun turns the old city gold. The most magical hour in Varanasi.

items.title: The Ganga Aarti
items.body: The spectacular evening ceremony at Dashashwamedh Ghat, with fire, incense, bells and chanting, watched from the steps or a boat on the river.

items.title: Sarnath & the Temples
items.body: The Buddhist site of Sarnath and the great temples of Varanasi, including Kashi Vishwanath, explored with your guide.

days.title: Fly to Varanasi
days.description: Domestic flight to Varanasi and transfer to your hotel. Evening Ganga Aarti from a boat.
suggestedActivities: Evening Ganga Aarti from a boat

days.title: Sunrise Boat, Temples & Sarnath
days.description: Sunrise boat ride, temples and Sarnath.

days.title: Ghats & Free Time
days.description: A relaxed day on the ghats, with optional Pind Daan prayers.

days.title: Fly Out
days.description: Domestic flight back to Delhi for your onward connection.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level

whyBook.heading: Varanasi Made Easy, By Air
whyBook.body: Domestic flights and a private guide make Varanasi accessible without the long overland journey. We handle the flights, the transfers and the boat timings. Dhesu has arranged spiritual India journeys since 1988.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Varanasi with Domestic Flights from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 4 day package is ideal for travellers who want the full Varanasi experience with the convenience of flying in and out. The domestic flights, usually via Delhi, save the long overland journey and leave more time for the city.

You get the sunrise boat ride, the Ganga Aarti, Sarnath and the temples, all with a private vehicle and guide in Varanasi.

It is the most comfortable, time-efficient way to experience the spiritual capital.

sections.heading: Why Fly to Varanasi
sections.body:
Varanasi is well connected by air, and flying in from Delhi or other cities saves many hours compared with the train or road. For travellers on limited time, this means more of the trip spent on the ghats and less in transit.

The convenience makes it easy to combine Varanasi with other parts of a larger India itinerary, such as the Golden Triangle.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Varanasi and Delhi Airports (VNS / DEL). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: Are the domestic flights included?
items.answer: Yes. This package includes the domestic flights to and from Varanasi, usually routed via Delhi. International flights to and from India are not included.

items.question: What is the best time to visit Varanasi?
items.answer: October to March offers the most comfortable weather for early boat rides and ghat walks. Dev Deepawali in November is spectacular but crowded. Summers are extremely hot, and the monsoon raises the river level.

items.question: Can I combine this with the Golden Triangle?
items.answer: Yes. Because this package uses Delhi as the hub, it combines easily with a Golden Triangle tour of Delhi, Agra and Jaipur. We can build a combined itinerary on request.
